patch.value: CodeFactor/Complexity: decompose the pm item-mutation command surface (create/update/register-mutation)

Eliminate the largest remaining CodeFactor 'Complex Method' findings in the repo: runCreate (CC 172, src/cli/commands/create.ts), the update.ts trio mutate (148)/runUpdate (77)/enforceAllowAuditUpdateScope (38), and the 6 shared register-mutation.ts arrows (CC 18-28). Behavior-preserving extraction into pure, well-named helpers; prune eslint-suppressions.json; keep 100% coverage + docstrings and contracts/full.json byte-identical.

runCreate and update.ts mutate/runUpdate/enforceAllowAuditUpdateScope and register-mutation arrows all drop to cyclomatic complexity <=17 (no ESLint complexity suppression); eslint-suppressions.json pruned for these files; 100/100/100/100 coverage retained; contracts snapshot + full.json byte-identical; changelog regenerated; all bots green.

runCreate and enforceAllowAuditUpdateScope both drop to cyclomatic complexity <=17 (no ESLint complexity suppression); eslint-suppressions.json pruned for both; 100/100/100/100 coverage retained; contracts snapshot + full.json byte-identical; changelog regenerated; all review bots green.

Eliminate the largest CodeFactor 'Complex Method' finding in the repo — runCreate (CC 172, src/cli/commands/create.ts) — plus the audit-scope guard enforceAllowAuditUpdateScope (CC 38, src/cli/commands/update.ts), behavior-preservingly. Decompose into pure, well-named, fully-docstringed helpers; prune eslint-suppressions.json for both functions; keep 100% coverage and contracts/full.json byte-identical. runUpdate (77), the update mutate apply-callback (148), and the register-mutation MCP arrows (18-28) are tracked as the follow-up stage.
CodeFactor/Complexity: decompose runCreate (CC 172) and the audit-scope update guard (CC 38)

author: claude-code-agent

patch.value: Decomposed runCreate (CC 172→≤17) into pure, docstringed helpers (resolveUnsettableOptionalString/Transformed, resolveCreateTypeSelection, collectCreateClearTargets, assert* conflict guards, assertNoMissingRequiredCreateOptions, resolveCreateTags/Order/CloseReason, inheritFocusedParent, validateCreateParentReference, resolveCreateSprintOrRelease, resolveCreateBlockedByDependency, collectCreateScheduleWarnings, writeCreatedItem) and reduced enforceAllowAuditUpdateScope (CC 38→≤17) via the shared pushIf helper. Pruned eslint-suppressions.json (create.ts 1→0, update.ts 3→2).
runCreate and enforceAllowAuditUpdateScope drop to CC<=17 with no complexity suppression; 100% coverage retained; contracts/full.json byte-identical.

Both functions revealed at CC<=17 with an empty suppressions baseline; 5264 tests 100/100/100/100; full.json byte-identical; manual temp-dir smoke of create/update paths behaves identically. runUpdate/mutate/register-mutation tracked as pm-0n6p.

Decomposed runCreate (CC 172→≤17) into pure, docstringed helpers (resolveUnsettableOptionalString/Transformed, resolveCreateTypeSelection, collectCreateClearTargets, assert* conflict guards, assertNoMissingRequiredCreateOptions, resolveCreateTags/Order/CloseReason, inheritFocusedParent, validateCreateParentReference, resolveCreateSprintOrRelease, resolveCreateBlockedByDependency, collectCreateScheduleWarnings, writeCreatedItem) and reduced enforceAllowAuditUpdateScope (CC 38→≤17) via the shared pushIf helper. Pruned eslint-suppressions.json (create.ts 1→0, update.ts 3→2).
